reality the general term of the sequence {a_n} is given as a_n = n - 1, so to find a_{b_1}, we substitute b_1 = 1 into the formula: a_{b_1} = a_1 = 1 - 1 = 0.  
***  
reality the sequence {b_n} is a geometric sequence with first term 1 and common ratio 2, so the general term is b_n = 1 * 2^{n-1}.  
***  
reality the sum a_{b_1} + a_{b_2} + ... + a_{b_9} requires calculating a_n for each b_n from 1 to 9.  
***  
reality each term a_{b_k} is calculated as b_k - 1, where b_k = 2^{k-1}.  
***  
reality the sum is the sum of (2^{k-1} - 1) for k from 1 to 9.  
***  
reality the sum can be simplified as the sum of 2^{k-1} from 1 to 9 minus the sum of 1 from 1 to 9.  
***  
reality the sum of 2^{k-1} from 1 to 9 is 2^9 - 1 = 512 - 1 = 511.  
***  
reality the sum of 1 from 1 to 9 is 9.  
***  
reality the final result is 511 - 9 = 502.  
***  
reality the final answer is 502.
